name: ev4-decision-kernel

scripts.validate:kroad-010-source: node --check kernel/validator/validate-downstream-consumer-contract.mjs && node --check kernel/validator/validate-downstream-consumer-canonical-lock.mjs && node --check kernel/validator/validate-downstream-consumer-lineage.mjs && node --check tools/validate-kroad-010-primary-baseline.mjs && node --check tools/validate-kroad-010-prototype-integrity.mjs && node --check tools/validate-kroad-010-history-matrix.mjs && node --check tools/kroad-010-history/common.mjs && node --check tools/kroad-010-history/build.mjs && node --check tools/kroad-010-history/validate.mjs && node -e "for (const p of process.argv.slice(1)) JSON.parse(require('node:fs').readFileSync(p, 'utf8'))" kernel/decision-governance/downstream-consumer-contract.v0.json kernel/decision-governance/downstream-consumer-lineage-binding.v0.json kernel/fixtures/contract-lock/downstream_consumer/canonical_lock_mutations.json kernel/fixtures/contract-lock/downstream_consumer/primary-validator-baseline.v0.json kernel/fixtures/history-matrix/downstream_consumer/history-matrix.v0.json
scripts.validate:mvk: node kernel/validator/validate-mvk.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-decision-record-v2.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-source-cards.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-consumption-boundaries.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-evidence-workspace.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-elementor-doc-coverage.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-decision-governance-foundation.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-resolver-contract.mjs && node kernel/resolver-mvp/resolve-high-risk-p0.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-resolver-fixture-triplets.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-l2-decision-correctness.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-kroad-009-vertical-slice.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-downstream-consumer-contract.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-downstream-consumer-canonical-lock.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-downstream-consumer-lineage.mjs
scripts.validate:coverage: npm run validate:kroad-010-source && git diff --check "${COVERAGE_BASE_SHA}..${COVERAGE_HEAD_SHA}" && npm run validate:mvk && npm run validate:roadmap-memory && node tools/validate-kroad-010-prototype-integrity.mjs && npm run validate:kroad-010-history-matrix && npm run validate:behavioral-coverage:advisory

description: Kernel-local MVK and staged KROAD-010 downstream consumer contract with canonical wiring, lineage validation, and deterministic Git-history compatibility testing.
